title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
